title: Create new blog post: Claude Code Zen Garden
Review outstanding changes and update specs
description: Three files modified: FeaturedPost, ArticleCard, BlogPostLayout. Check if OpenSpec specs need updating to reflect these changes.
close_reason: Updated blog-post and blog-listing specs to reflect code changes

title: Create design.md for migrate-legacy-specs change
description: Write the design artifact for the migrate-legacy-specs OpenSpec change, covering consolidation strategy, capability grouping, format shift, migration plan, and risks.
close_reason: Design artifact created at openspec/changes/migrate-legacy-specs/design.md. Covers consolidation strategy (11 capability groups), format shift to visual descriptions, migration plan in 3 phases, risks/trade-offs, and open questions.

title: Create tasks artifact for migrate-legacy-specs change
description: Write tasks.md breaking down the spec migration implementation into checkboxed tasks following the 3-phase migration plan from the design.
close_reason: Tasks artifact created with 15 tasks across 4 phases: independent capabilities, shared/layout, page capabilities, cleanup/validation.

title: Add parallax effect for post hero image on page scroll
description: Add a parallax scrolling effect to the hero image on blog post pages, so the image moves at a different rate than the content as the user scrolls.

title: Create specs artifact for migrate-legacy-specs change
description: Write 11 delta spec files under openspec/changes/migrate-legacy-specs/specs/<capability>/spec.md, transforming 51 legacy specs into requirement-format delta specs.
close_reason: Created 11 delta spec files covering all capabilities: helpers, testing, ui-primitives, common-sections, layout, about-page, resume-page, services-page, home-page, blog-listing, blog-post. All 51 legacy specs transformed into requirement-format with scenarios.

title: Apply migrate-legacy-specs: create 11 capability specs
description: Implement all 15 tasks: create 11 capability specs in openspec/specs/, update CLAUDE.md references, remove legacy /specs/ directory, validate.
close_reason: All 11 capability specs created in openspec/specs/. CLAUDE.md updated. Change archived to openspec/changes/archive/2026-02-22-migrate-legacy-specs/. Legacy /specs/ kept per user request. Validation task skipped (format mismatch).

title: Minify sticky page header on scroll down
description: Shrink/minify the sticky page header when the user scrolls down, reducing its size to give more content space. Restore full size on scroll to top.
